untranslatable_reason: Signal requires tracking '10 bars in one direction' and '3-bar reversal confirmation' — these require sequential bar-by-bar comparisons and state tracking not expressible in single-bar condition logic. Also 'minimum_price_change_magnitude: 1.5 ATR' requires directional magnitude tracking across multiple bars.
translation_notes: Translated core concepts: (1) Gradual volatility requirement → atr_14 < 1% of price (0.01 decimal scale); (2) Price above/below 10-period MA as trend confirmation → close vs sma_10; (3) Direction is CONTEXT_DEPENDENT based on whether close is above or below sma_10. However, the sequential bar counting and multi-bar reversal logic cannot be properly encoded in this three-field condition format and would require external state management.
